status_detail: 200 MW PEM electrolysis project in Antwerp, Belgium, by Air Liquide. Part of the IPCEI Hydrogen program. Producing green hydrogen for refinery, chemical, and industrial customers in the Antwerp port area. FID targeted 2026. COD target 2029.

data_management.narrative_summary: TRAILBLAZER is Air Liquide's planned 200 MW PEM electrolysis project in the Port of Antwerp, Belgium. It is one of the IPCEI Hydrogen projects supported by the European Commission and Belgian federal/regional governments. The plant will produce green hydrogen for refinery, chemical, and industrial customers in the Antwerp port area, Europe's largest chemical cluster. Air Liquide plans to leverage its existing hydrogen pipeline network in the Antwerp region to distribute the green hydrogen. This project is part of Air Liquide's multi-project European hydrogen investment program alongside Normand'Hy (GA-PR-001), ELYgator (GA-PR-017), and the Zeeland JV (GA-PR-057).

power.grid_connection_detail: Grid-connected at Port of Antwerp. Belgian offshore wind PPAs.

offtake.offtaker_name: Industrial users in Antwerp port chemical cluster

sources.title: Air Liquide TRAILBLAZER — 200 MW PEM hydrogen project, Antwerp IPCEI
sources.author: Air Liquide / European Commission
